form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; then settled down to finish fifth over 1609m at Port Pirie last start. Showed ability the run before when he won by 2.25 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr3) held up early, at Shepparton (2:03.70) beating Miss Hermes in NR 36 to 40 on March 17 at $3.40 at the bell was 5th-6.83. Can bounce back to form.
